ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-19-2017 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On Filing Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Jan-11-2017 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-12-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Danton Lee Bryans (via court call) in Propria Persona.

The Court stated that there has been no declaration regarding substantial claims filed. Mr. Bryans stated that he believes that there are medical claims, that there has been a lack of accounting from the medical institution as they need letters and that there are personal property assets and intangible assets that are more substantial than the debts against the estate. The Court asked if Mr. Bryans now thinks they have assets above $19,000.00. Mr. Bryans reported that there is approximately $368,000.00 in Chase Bank and Wells Fargo accounts and that there is personal property valued at $8000.00 - $9000.00. The Court stated that this all leads to the need for a bond and that the appropriate amount of the bond is $377,000.00. Mr. Bryans stated that he can get that. The Court stated that the bond needs to post before letters can be issued, that it will grant the Petition for Letters of Administration subject to posting the bond and that if it is found that the amount of assets is greater (or less) an ex parte petition to increase/decrease bond will need to be filed.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-15-2016 Continued To Jul-06-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
